calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Motion For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Apr-18-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Michael Terrizzi, Esq. for Plaintiff: 94 Bayo Vista Avenue Homeowners Assoc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Janet Quinn-Dennis, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: James L. Brown as follows:
Damages $1,339.29
Prejudgment Interest $461.17
Attorney's Fees $1,455.00
Other Fees: $1,795.30
Costs $101.67, for a total of $5,152.43
Judgment signed in open court.
